name: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption
description: The product does not properly control the allocation and maintenance of a limited resource, allowing an attacker to exhaust available resources (memory, CPU, connections, file descriptors) and cause denial of service.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node triggers resource allocation at TRANSFORM or STORAGE nodes (thread creation, memory allocation, file handle opening, connection pooling) without a CONTROL node enforcing limits, quotas, throttling, or timeouts on the total resources consumed
